chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2523 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------- 17.02.2025 Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh SIP Imran ------------------------------------ This is date by Court. Applicant/accused and his counsel are called absent, without any intimation. Notice issued to complainant is returned served but he is called absent. Non-appearance of the applicant/accused, who was granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 04.11.2024, shows that they have lost interest in pursuing their case, therefore, instant criminal bail application is dismissed and interim pre-arrest bail granted to applicant/ accused Iftikhar Ali Qadri is hereby recalled. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
